name: Thai Cucumber Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Round, thin red chile - pepper slices (with seeds)
2 heaping tablespoons Dried shrimp, ground to a coarse powder
1/4 cup Crushed roasted or fried peanuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the cucumbers and cut off the ends. Cut them in half lengthwise and scrape out the seeds.
2. Slice the cucumbers thinly into half moons.
3. Add the cucumbers to a bowl with the chiles, onion, ground shrimp, lime juice, fish sauce, sugar, and peanut oil.
4. Toss well to combine all ingredients.
5. Allow the salad to sit or serve immediately sprinkled with the crushed peanuts.
